# Vendored Web Assets

Rapid Inbox ships these browser assets locally so the web UI can run without
requesting public CDNs at runtime.

| Asset | Version | License |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AOS | 2.3.1 | MIT |
| Inter | Google Fonts CSS snapshot | SIL Open Font License |
| JetBrains Mono | Google Fonts CSS snapshot | SIL Open Font License |
| Lucide | 0.468.0 | ISC |
| normalize.css | 8.0.1 | MIT |
| Source Serif 4 | Google Fonts CSS snapshot | SIL Open Font License |
| Typed.js | 2.1.0 | MIT |
